title: Sterling ETN4545V 5 Pin Euro Thumbturn Cylinder, Nickel, 45x45mm
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
description: Product Description The Sterling 5 pin thumbturn euro cylinder is manufactured solid brass body and plug with a 5 pin tumbler locking mechanism and anti-pick mushroom pins. It also has a 30¬∞ offset cam, 12,000 key differs and is finished in Nickel. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wachter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burg-Wachter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
